latin: Duae sorores ad novam domum in agris migraverunt. in silva prope domum monstrum magnum et amicum invenerunt. Totoro erat nomen eius, et in arbore maxima habitabat.

questions.prompt: Where did the sisters move to?
questions.target: A new house in the countryside
choices: A new house in the countryside

translation: Two sisters moved to a new house in the countryside. In the forest near the house they found a big and friendly creature. His name was Totoro, and he lived in a very large tree.
